Video.summary: After watching a clip of Ferrofluid, Sophie and Trace investigate the magic (and science) of magnets.
Video.title: Theory of Awesome | Stuck On You

Image.alt: Theory of Awesome | Stuck On You
Theory of Awesome | Stuck On You
Theory of Awesome | Stuck On You

Video.summary: Trace and Sophie see a wingsuit flyer jump from a helicopter and land on cardboard boxes without a parachute.
Video.title: Theory of Awesome | No Parachute

Video.summary: After a jet suit demo, our hosts explore extreme inventions that launch riders skyward and how they work.
Video.title: Theory of Awesome | Human Powered Flight

Image.alt: Theory of Awesome | Human Powered Flight
Theory of Awesome | Human Powered Flight
Theory of Awesome | Human Powered Flight

Video.summary: A humanoid robot transformation, a mountain of cats, a limestone leaf sculpture, and more.
Video.title: Spotlight | Ep. 2.5

Video.title: Spotlight | Ep. 2.6

Video.summary: The sky's the limit for these mystifying spinners who see the world as one big playground.
Video.title: Showcase | Without Limits

Video.summary: A wall doesn't have to be an obstacle. It can also be an opportunity.
Video.title: Showcase | Make a Run for It

Image.alt: Showcase | Make a Run for It
Showcase | Make a Run for It
Showcase | Make a Run for It

Video.summary: On blades, skates, or none at all, these dizzying dancers are spinning at top speed.
Video.title: Showcase | Grease the Wheels

Video.summary: These passionate artisans know that to become extraordinary, you have to do a little extra.
Video.title: Showcase | Take Action

Video.summary: Hurdles are meant to be jumped over and these athletes aren't afraid to jump.
Video.title: Showcase | No Risk, No Reward

Video.summary: With grace and poise comes strength and determination.
Video.title: Exhibition Awesome | Style

Video.title: Exhibition Awesome | Style

Video.summary: Athletes put their own spin on the sports they love.
Video.title: Exhibition Awesome | With a Twist

Video.summary: If at first they don't succeed, they try, try again.
Video.title: Exhibition Awesome | Practice Makes Perfect

Video.summary: Gymnastics' fanciest flips and finest finesse.
Video.title: Exhibition Awesome | All Around Acrobats

Video.summary: Nothing stands in the way of these parkour professionals.
Video.title: Exhibition Awesome | Feats of Freerunning

Video.summary: These creative thinkers show there's more to to household items than meets the eye.
Video.title: Exhibition Awesome | Objective, Vol. 2

Video.summary: These inspirational movers and groovers are going with the flow.
Video.title: Exhibition Awesome | Movement Motivation, Vol. 1

Video.summary: Athletes of many diciplines reach for new heights.
Video.title: Exhibition Awesome | Elevate
